text:
All 9 backend changes are done and verified. Summary:

1. `backend/app/models/subscription.py` — SubscriptionTier: FREE + PRO only
2. `backend/app/models/usage.py` — Added `bonus_count` and `reward_ads_watched` columns
3. `backend/app/services/quota_service.py` — Full rewrite: DAILY_LIMIT=200, BONUS_PER_AD=10, MAX_REWARD_ADS_PER_DAY=5, new `grant_reward_bonus()`, base-first decrement logic
4. `backend/app/schemas/subscription.py` — QuotaResponse: removed `tier`, added `bonus_remaining`/`reward_ads_watched`/`max_reward_ads`; new `RewardClaimResponse`
5. `backend/app/routers/quota.py` — Added `POST /api/quota/reward` endpoint
6. `backend/app/routers/llm.py` — 429 message changed to "Watch a reward ad for extra requests."
7. `backend/app/services/receipt_validator.py` — PRODUCT_TIER_MAP simplified to single PRO entry
8. `backend/app/schemas/auth.py` — Added `is_pro: bool = False` to AuthUserInfo
9. `backend/app/routers/auth.py` — `_build_user_info()` computes `is_pro` based on PRO tier + expiry check

All imports verified clean. A DB migration will be needed for the two new `usage_records` columns (`bonus_count`, `reward_ads_watched`) before deploying.
summary: All 9 backend BM migration changes complete
